notes: Qatar photo/QID audit 2026-05-24: verifier found no clean Wikimedia photo for 13 players; added verified Wikidata QIDs for Al-Hashmi Al-Hussain and Mubarak Shanan; Fahad Younis and Rayyan Al-Ali still have no confirmed Wikidata identity.

Qatar QID follow-up 2026-05-25: confirmed Fahad Younis/Fahad Younes as Wikidata Q24007738 via matching DOB, goalkeeper position, Qatar citizenship, and Transfermarkt ID 311726; Rayyan Al-Ali remains without an unambiguous Wikidata QID and has an identity_review note.
